violations.description: General food protection. — --Food item was not protected from potential contamination. - Raw chicken, shrimp found on floor in walk-in cooler.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Walls, and ceiling were not finished constructed between the cooking areas in kitchen, exposed wood.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Floor in dish area needs repair. The black paint is peeling making not cleanable. - Ceiling in basement storage area and open area has water damage.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location - Fly strips found throughout kitchen.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
